metadata.description: Name of the Application Insights component in the same resource group.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## HelpdeskAI — Live Monitoring

All panels update with the **Time Range** selector. The **Conversation** dropdown (bottom panel) auto-populates from recent sessions that have the `thread.id` span tag (requires a chat turn after 2026-04-03 deployment)."},"name":"header"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"p-tr","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"timeRange","label":"Time Range","type":4,"value":{"durationMs":14400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":1800000},{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":14400000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000}]}},{"id":"p-th","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"threadId","label":"Conversation","type":2,"isRequired":false,"query":"dependencies
| where isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions["thread.id"]))
| summarize LastSeen=max(timestamp), Turns=dcount(operation_Id) by ThreadId=tostring(customDimensions["thread.id"])
| top 30 by LastSeen desc
| project value=ThreadId, label=strcat(ThreadId, " (", Turns, " turns, last: ", format_datetime(LastSeen, "MM-dd HH:mm"), ")")
","timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","typeSettings":{"additionalResourceOptions":[],"showDefault":false},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"}]},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"---
### Request Volume — V1 vs V2"},"name":"s1"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"requests
| where name in ("POST /agent", "POST /agent/v2", "POST /agent/demo")
| extend Route = case(name == "POST /agent/v2", "V2 (multi-agent)", name == "POST /agent/demo", "Demo", "V1 (single-agent)")
| summarize Requests=count(), P50ms=round(percentile(duration,50),0), P95ms=round(percentile(duration,95),0), Errors=countif(success==false) by Route","size":3,"timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"P50ms","formatter":3,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}},{"columnMatch":"P95ms","formatter":3,"formatOptions":{"palette":"orange"}}]}},"customWidth":"40","name":"p1"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"requests
| where name in ("POST /agent", "POST /agent/v2")
| extend Route = iif(name == "POST /agent/v2", "V2", "V1")
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 30m), Route","size":3,"timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"barchart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"V1","color":"blue"},{"seriesName":"V2","color":"purple"}]}},"customWidth":"60","name":"p2"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"---
### Agent Routing — All Routes (V1 single agent · V2 orchestrator + specialists)"},"name":"s2"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"dependencies
| where name startswith "invoke_agent"
| extend Agent = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.name"])
| where isnotempty(Agent)
| summarize Invocations=count(), AvgMs=round(avg(duration),0), P95Ms=round(percentile(duration,95),0) by Agent
| order by Invocations desc","size":3,"timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"AvgMs","formatter":3,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}},{"columnMatch":"P95Ms","formatter":3,"formatOptions":{"palette":"orange"}}]}},"customWidth":"55","name":"p3"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"dependencies
| where name startswith "invoke_agent"
| extend Agent = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.name"])
| where isnotempty(Agent)
| summarize count() by Agent","size":3,"timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"piechart"},"customWidth":"45","name":"p4"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"---
### Eval Run Quality"},"name":"s3"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces
| where message has "Eval" and (message has "PASSED" or message has "FAILED")
| extend passed = message has "PASSED"
| extend executionName = extract("Eval ([0-9-_]+) ", 1, message)
| where isnotempty(executionName)
| summarize Passed=countif(passed), Failed=countif(not(passed)) by ExecutionName=executionName
| extend Total=Passed+Failed
| order by ExecutionName desc","size":3,"noDataMessage":"No eval runs in this time range.","timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Passed","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":">","thresholdValue":"0","representation":"success","text":"{0}"},{"operator":"Default","representation":"disabled","text":"0"}]}},{"columnMatch":"Failed","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":">","thresholdValue":"0","representation":"failed","text":"{0}"},{"operator":"Default","representation":"success","text":"0"}]}}]}},"customWidth":"50","name":"p5"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces
| where message has "Eval" and (message has "PASSED" or message has "FAILED")
| extend passed = message has "PASSED"
| summarize Passed=countif(passed), Failed=countif(not(passed)) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc","size":3,"noDataMessage":"No eval data in this time range.","timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"barchart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"Passed","color":"green"},{"seriesName":"Failed","color":"red"}]}},"customWidth":"50","name":"p6"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"---
### Error Rate"},"name":"s4"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let ex = exceptions | summarize n=count() by bin(timestamp,15m) | extend type="Exceptions";
let fd = dependencies | where success==false | summarize n=count() by bin(timestamp,15m) | extend type="Failed Spans";
union ex, fd | order by timestamp asc","size":3,"timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"linechart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"Exceptions","color":"red"},{"seriesName":"Failed Spans","color":"orange"}]}},"name":"p7"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"---
### Conversation Trace

Select a conversation from the **Conversation** dropdown above. The dropdown auto-populates from chat sessions started after 2026-04-03. To populate: open the app, start a chat, return here and click Refresh."},"name":"s5"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"dependencies
| where tostring(customDimensions["thread.id"]) == "{threadId}"
| extend Agent=tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.name"]), User=tostring(customDimensions["enduser.id"])
| project Timestamp=timestamp, Span=name, Agent, DurationMs=round(duration,0), Success=success, User
| order by Timestamp asc","size":0,"noDataMessage":"No spans found for this thread.id. Start a new chat session then select it from the Conversation dropdown above.","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"DurationMs","formatter":3,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}},{"columnMatch":"Success","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"true","representation":"success","text":""},{"operator":"Default","representation":"failed","text":""}]}}]}},"name":"p8"}],"styleSettings":{},"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
